jobs.description: As a software-developer at Quadira i have had the chance to pursue the ambition to become a Fullstack Developer, working on different aspects of the in-house software Advanced-Forms, and the future successor Advanced-Forms Next
highlights: Designed new modules for Advanced-Forms, including connectors to SharePoint and MijnOverheid
Contributed to the (architectural) design for the startup of Advanced-Forms Next
Completely overhauled the CI/CD pipelines for all product & services
Created new backup- and disaster-recovery protocols for all production environments
Setup a local server network & maintained different development tools
Kept first aid kits & fire extinguisers up to date.
Created and maintained flight routes & emergency plans throughout the 2 buildings.
Created an emergency & evacuation plan, and setup logs for workplace incidents
